_comment: tradinglab configuration file. Load via File -> Load Configuration. Keys starting with underscore are documentation-only and ignored on load. Delete any key to fall back to its built-in default.
_comment_default_window_bars: Number of bars in the right-edge default window (Reset view, fresh load, ticker change). Larger = more history visible; smaller = more zoomed-in by default.
_comment_display_tz: IANA timezone (e.g. 'America/Los_Angeles') applied to intraday timestamps. Empty = display in Eastern Time (market local).
_comment_price_bot_pad_frac: Bottom padding on price axes as a fraction of the data span.
_comment_price_top_pad_frac: Top headroom on price axes as a fraction of the data span. Reserves space for the always-on top-left OHLCV readout strip so the highest bar can't collide with it.
_comment_scroll_zoom_invert: Mouse-wheel zoom direction. False = scroll DOWN zooms IN (TradingView). True = scroll UP zooms IN (macOS natural-scroll).
_comment_startup_defaults: Per-key startup overrides. Recognized keys: ticker, compare, interval, source, theme. Sparse merge over BUILTIN_STARTUP_DEFAULTS in constants.py.
_comment_startup_height_pct: Fraction of the current screen height used for the main window when no reasonable saved geometry exists.
_comment_startup_width_pct: Fraction of the current screen width used for the main window when no reasonable saved geometry exists.
_comment_theme_overrides: Per-theme color overrides. Sparse merge over the built-in light/dark themes. Schema: {'light': {key: '#hex', ...}, 'dark': {...}}.
